judgment.summary: Highly profitable and rapidly growing tech giant with strong cash flow and a solid analyst consensus.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 91.6%; next earnings date is 2026-07-23.
positives: Earnings growth 82.0% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 81.2% indicate significant profitability expansion.
Operating margin 36.1% and profit margin 37.9% demonstrate strong operational efficiency and pricing power.
Return on equity 38.9% and return on assets 14.6% show excellent capital utilization.
Free cash flow $27.92B TTM provides substantial financial flexibility.
Analyst consensus is a strong buy with a mean target price of $428.96.
negatives: Forward P/E 26.67x and PEG ratio 1.53x suggest the stock is priced for continued high growth.
Debt/Equity ratio of 20.03% is notable, though offset by significant cash reserves.
Beta of 1.27 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) announced an expansion of its Gemini Enterprise Agent Marketplace through a new partnership with Amdocs. This development aims to enhance AI capabilities for enterprise clients. While headlines also noted Nvidia's high valuation, the direct news for GOOGL focuses on strategic AI ecosystem growth.

headlines.title: Even at $5 Trillion, Nvidia Is Underappreciated
Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) Expands Gemini Enterprise Agent Marketplace with Amdocs Partnership
